name: Bamboo Coffee Pod Holder for Counter - Brightroom™
description:
Organize your coffee station with this Coffee Pod Holder for Counter from Brightroom™. Crafted from bamboo, this rectangular holder features a smooth tabletop surface that's perfect for your coffee maker and accessories. The convenient pull-out drawer underneath includes multiple divided sections to keep your coffee pods neatly sorted and easily accessible for your daily brewing routine. Plus, the light brown finish adds a warm touch to your decor.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
